infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: JIMMI needs camera access to scan food items and take photos for meal tracking.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: JIMMI needs microphone access for voice input and meal logging.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: JIMMI needs access to your photo library to select images for meal tracking.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddOnlyUsageDescription: JIMMI needs permission to save photos to your library.
